record.candidate_surface: separation produced by a parent-local discriminator against duplicated local parameters, central scheduling, or labels
record.comparator_surface: the source-current adequacy finding and matched label, scheduler, susceptibility, or scaffold-withdrawal contrast
record.denominator_definition: maximum absolute magnitude of the paired reference and comparator discriminator responses, bounded below by measurement_resolution
record.numerator_definition: parent-local discriminator response minus its matched alternative-mechanism response; artifact-only cells use not_applicable until a live contrast exists

delta.rationale: No candidate-blind matched-null calibration has executed; artifact inspection remains not_applicable

record.zero_denominator_policy: Use measurement_resolution as the denominator floor and record resolution_limited when both paired response magnitudes remain at that floor
